title: Elbaf Exploration — Chapter 1141
main_description: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries. This chapter contains 5 structured story parts and 160 cleaned dialogue lines.
